text.tspan: Total official flows commitments for aid for trade, by recipient, 2022

Gross disbursements and commitments of total
Official Development Assistance
from all donors for aid for
trade. This data is expressed in US dollars. It is adjusted for inflation but does not account for differences in
Data source: Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development
Note: This data is expressed in constant 2022 US$.
